news.title: Gold Rises After US and Iran Agree Deal That Would Reopen Hormuz
news.description: Gold rose after the US and Iran announced an interim deal to end hostilities and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, easing global inflation fears and potentially tempering expectations for interest-rate hikes.

news.title: Trump heads to France for 1st G7 summit since US-Iran war began
